Sale · on the banks of the Mersey

A traditional riverside pub in a woodland setting — honest food, well-kept ales, a big beer garden and a proper welcome.

Get directions 0161 905 2647

The riverside local

Jackson's Boat has stood by the Mersey for generations — a traditional pub tucked into the woodland on the edge of Sale Water Park.

Great-tasting pub food, well-kept ales and a large beer garden with a kids' play area, just 500 yards from Junction 6 of the M60. Easy to find, and worth the stroll.

A proper riverside pub

Good food, good drinks and a warm welcome — whatever the weather

Riverside beer garden

A big garden and play area by the water — picnic benches, festoon lights and live music on summer nights.

Real ales & craft beers

A well-kept bar of cask ales, craft lagers and ciders — pull up a stool and settle in.

Dogs & families welcome

Four-legged friends get their own menu, and there's plenty of room for the kids. Walkers and cyclists too.
